description: creationLocked gate fixture (D-GH32): a LOCALLY-ONLY character (no campaignBound event anywhere in the LOG) whose spend crosses DATA.level1AP mid-LOG. Asserts the automatic threshold trigger does NOT fire for a character never bound to a campaign — both racial traits price at the flat creation rate (2+4=6) despite total spend (57) exceeding the anchor, because only an explicit creationLocked event (not present here) can lock a purely local character.

events.label: Spend filler crossing the creation-pricing threshold
